title: Hooded Lantern

markdown:
# Hooded Lantern

- **Type**: G|XPHB
- **Cost**: 5 gp
- **Weight**: 2 lb.

A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast [[bright_light Light]] in a 30-foot radius and [[dim_light Light]] for an additional 30 feet. As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can lower the hood, reducing the light to [[dim_light Light]] in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.
